summary:
Intermittent pneumatic compression devices are mainly prescribed to prevent deep vein thrombosis in high-risk groups due to reduced mobility or surgery; they do not treat underlying conditions like varicose veins.  
\boxed{A}

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
